# BP-138 positive variant: a GORM delete hook sends mail directly.
lang: go
file: BP-138-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-smtp-hook
---
package sample

import (
	"net/smtp"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct{}

// AfterDelete notifies the audit mailbox.
func (a *Account) AfterDelete(tx *gorm.DB) error {
	return smtp.SendMail("smtp.example:25", nil, "audit@example", []string{"ops@example"}, []byte("deleted"))
}
